context: Tests whether the agent adds correct Renovate annotations to existing externals and produces matching custom manager rules with the right datasources and fileMatch patterns for the .chezmoiexternals/ directory.

checklist.name: Renovate annotation in zsh file
checklist.description: updated_zsh.externals.toml contains `# renovate:` annotations before each git-repo entry

checklist.name: Annotation format correct
checklist.description: Renovate annotations follow the pattern `# renovate: repo=USER/REPO branch=BRANCH` (contains both repo= and branch= parts)

checklist.name: Annotation position
checklist.description: Each `# renovate:` annotation appears immediately before (not after) its external definition

checklist.name: Annotation in bat file
checklist.description: updated_bat.externals.toml contains a `# renovate:` annotation before the file entry

checklist.name: git-refs rule for revision field
checklist.description: renovate_rules.json5 includes a rule with `datasourceTemplate: 'git-refs'` targeting the revision field in the zsh externals

checklist.name: git-refs rule for raw file URL
checklist.description: renovate_rules.json5 includes a rule with `datasourceTemplate: 'git-refs'` targeting the SHA in the bat raw file URL

checklist.name: Correct fileMatch pattern
checklist.description: All Renovate rules use fileMatch targeting .chezmoiexternals/ (pattern contains `.chezmoiexternals`)

checklist.name: matchStrings present
checklist.description: Each rule includes a `matchStrings` array with at least one regex pattern containing named capture groups

checklist.name: currentDigest capture group
checklist.description: At least one matchStrings regex contains `(?<currentDigest>[a-f0-9]{40})` or similar SHA pattern

checklist.name: No apply commands
checklist.description: Output files do not include instructions to immediately run `chezmoi apply` or modify the live repo
